relics.name: Arcane Crystal
relics.description: Start each combat with 1 additional Mana.

relics.name: Warrior's Crest
relics.description: Start each combat with 2 Strength.

relics.name: Mana Shard
relics.description: Deal 3 damage to a random enemy when you play a Power card.

relics.name: Lucky Coin
relics.description: Gain 5 Gold after each combat.

relics.name: Holy Symbol
relics.description: Heal 3 HP at the start of each combat.

relics.name: Dragon Scale
relics.description: Attacks deal 2 additional damage.

relics.name: Dark Pendant
relics.description: When you lose HP, gain 1 Strength.

relics.name: Songbook
relics.description: Draw 1 additional card at the start of each turn.

relics.name: Phoenix Feather
relics.description: Once per run, survive lethal damage and heal to 50% HP.

relics.name: Berserker's Axe
relics.description: Deal 25% more damage. Take 25% more damage.

relics.name: Mana Potion
relics.description: Gain 1 mana at the start of each turn.

relics.name: Thieves' Gloves
relics.description: Gain 3 Gold after winning a combat.

relics.name: Shield of Valor
relics.description: Start each combat with 5 Block.

relics.name: Spell Tome
relics.description: Power cards cost 1 less mana.

relics.name: Vampire Fang
relics.description: Heal 2 HP when you deal damage to an enemy.

relics.name: Boots of Speed
relics.description: Draw 1 extra card on the first turn of each combat.

relics.name: Crystal Heart
relics.description: Double all healing received.

relics.name: Demon's Contract
relics.description: Start each combat with 5 Strength. Lose 2 HP at the start of each turn.

relics.name: Time Crystal
relics.description: Once per combat, gain an extra turn.

relics.name: Mirror of Erith
relics.description: Copy the first card you play each combat.

relics.name: Excalibur Shard
relics.description: All Attacks deal double damage. You cannot gain Block.

relics.name: Genie's Lamp
relics.description: At the start of each combat, add a random Legendary card to your hand.

relics.name: Void Stone
relics.description: Cards cost 0 mana. You cannot draw cards.

relics.name: Eternal Flame
relics.description: At the end of each turn, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies and heal 5 HP.
